<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
<title>Generador de Documentos Legales — LSC DA's Office</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=EB+Garamond:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;0,600;1,400&family=Courier+Prime:wght@400;700&family=Oswald:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
:root{
  /* Paleta adaptada a las imágenes: granate institucional, azul noche y dorado DA */
  --navy:#071323;--navy-mid:#0b1a2f;--navy-soft:#102745;
  --gold:#c9a447;--gold-light:#e3c36c;--cream:#f1eadc;--paper:#fbf6eb;
  --ink:#171717;--ink-mid:#343434;--ink-light:#6a6a6a;--rule:#c7bda7;
  --red:#8a1717;--red-dark:#5f0e0e;--red-soft:#a32620;--field:#fffdf8;--field-border:#b6aa91;
}
body{background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--red-dark) 0,var(--navy) 230px,var(--navy) 100%);font-family:'EB Garamond',Georgia,serif;color:var(--ink);min-height:100vh}
.hero{min-height:170px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(100,17,17,.76),rgba(134,24,24,.62)), url('data:image/png;base64,'), var(--navy);background-size:cover;background-position:center;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border-bottom:2px solid var(--gold);padding:1.5rem}
.hero-inner{width:min(1180px,100%);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1.5rem;color:white}
.hero-mark{width:76px;height:76px;border:2px solid var(--gold);border-radius:50%;display:grid;place-items:center;font-family:'Oswald',sans-serif;font-size:11px;color:var(--gold);line-height:1.15;text-align:center;background:rgba(7,20,39,.65)}
.hero-text .small{font-family:'Oswald',sans-serif;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:.8rem;color:#f1d789}
.hero-text h1{font-family:'Oswald',sans-serif;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#f5f0e8;font-size:clamp(1.5rem,3vw,2.6rem);font-weight:500}
.hero-text p{font-style:italic;color:#d0d8e8;font-size:1rem;margin-top:.25rem}
.tabs{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:5;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--red-dark),var(--navy-mid));border-bottom:1px solid rgba(201,164,71,.45);display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap;padding:.8rem 1rem;box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(0,0,0,.22)}
.tab-btn,.warrant-btn,.small-btn,.tool-btn,.generate-btn{font-family:'Oswald',sans-serif;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:pointer;transition:.15s}
.tab-btn{background:transparent;color:var(--gold);border:1px solid rgba(209,173,72,.55);padding:.55rem 1rem}
.tab-btn.active,.tab-btn:hover{background:var(--gold);color:var(--navy)}
.view{display:none}.view.active{display:block}
.selector-section{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--navy-mid),var(--red-dark));padding:1.5rem;text-align:center;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(201,164,71,.28)}
.selector-label{font-family:'Oswald',sans-serif;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:.82rem;margin-bottom:.8rem}
.warrant-btns{display:flex;gap:1rem;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap}
.warrant-btn{font-size:.95rem;padding:.7rem 1.7rem;border:1.5px solid var(--gold);background:transparent;color:var(--gold)}
.warrant-btn:hover{background:rgba(209,173,72,.12)}
.warrant-btn.active{background:var(--gold);color:var(--navy)}
.main{display:flex;justify-content:center;padding:2rem 1.2rem;gap:2rem;align-items:flex-start}
.panel{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#f6f0e3,var(--cream));border:1px solid var(--gold);width:100%;padding:1.5rem;box-shadow:0 10px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.22)}
.form-panel{max-width:560px}.preview-panel{max-width:720px;width:100%}
.panel h2{font-family:'Oswald',sans-serif;color:var(--navy);font-size:1rem;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;border-bottom:1.5px solid var(--navy);padding-bottom:.5rem;margin-bottom:1.2rem}
.form-section{margin-bottom:1.35rem}.form-section-title{font-family:'Oswald',sans-serif;color:var(--red-dark);font-size:.78rem;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;border-bottom:.5px solid var(--gold);padding-bottom:.3rem;margin-bottom:.7rem}
.field-group{margin-bottom:.8rem}label{display:block;font-family:'Oswald',sans-serif;letter-spacing:.07em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ink-mid);font-size:.76rem;margin-bottom:.3rem}
input,textarea,select{width:100%;padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid var(--field-border);background:var(--field);font-family:'EB Garamond',serif;font-size:1rem;color:var(--ink);outline:none;border-radius:0}
textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:94px;line-height:1.6}input:focus,textarea:focus,select:focus{border-color:var(--red);box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(138,23,23,.12)}
.row-2{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:.7rem}
.item-line{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto;gap:.45rem;align-items:end;margin-bottom:.6rem}
.small-btn{border:1px solid var(--field-border);background:transparent;color:var(--ink-mid);padding:.43rem .75rem;font-size:.72rem}
.small-btn:hover{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--navy);background:rgba(209,173,72,.15)}
.small-btn.danger:hover{border-color:var(--red);color:var(--red);background:rgba(134,24,24,.08)}
.generate-btn{width:100%;padding:.85rem;background:var(--navy);color:var(--gold);border:0;font-size:1rem;font-weight:600;margin-top:.4rem}
.generate-btn:hover{background:var(--navy-soft)}
.preview-toolbar{display:flex;justify-content:flex-end;gap:.7rem;margin-bottom:.7rem;flex-wrap:wrap}
.tool-btn{font-size:.76rem;padding:.45rem .9rem;background:rgba(209,173,72,.14);border:1px solid var(--gold);color:var(--gold)}
.tool-btn:hover{background:rgba(209,173,72,.28)}
#document{background:var(--paper);border:1px solid #c8c0b0;padding:3rem 3.3rem;font-size:1rem;line-height:1.7;box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.35);position:relative}
#document::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:6px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--navy),#2a4a7a,var(--navy))}
.confidential-stamp{position:absolute;top:3.3rem;right:2.3rem;border:2.5px solid var(--red);color:var(--red);font-family:'Oswald',sans-serif;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:.3rem .6rem;transform:rotate(8deg);opacity:.55}
.doc-header{text-align:center;margin-bottom:1.5rem;padding-bottom:1.5rem;border-bottom:2px double var(--ink-mid)}
.doc-agency,.doc-state,.doc-title-en,.doc-section-title,.doc-footer,.sig-line .label{font-family:'Oswald',sans-serif;text-transform:uppercase}
.doc-agency{font-size:.75rem;letter-spacing:.18em;color:var(--ink-mid)}.doc-state{font-size:.7rem;letter-spacing:.14em;color:var(--ink-light)}
.doc-title-en{font-size:1.7rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.14em;color:var(--navy);margin:.7rem 0 .1rem}.doc-title-es{font-style:italic;font-size:1.1rem;color:var(--ink-mid)}
.doc-case-badge{display:inline-block;margin-top:.7rem;font-family:'Courier Prime',monospace;font-size:.82rem;color:var(--ink-light);background:rgba(0,0,0,.05);padding:.2rem .7rem;border:.5px solid var(--rule)}
.doc-section{margin-bottom:1.35rem}.doc-section-title{font-size:.85rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.1em;color:var(--navy);border-bottom:1px solid var(--rule);padding-bottom:.3rem;margin-bottom:.7rem}
.doc-field-row{display:flex;gap:.5rem;margin-bottom:.35rem;font-size:.97rem}.doc-field-label{font-weight:600;min-width:185px;color:var(--ink-mid)}.doc-field-value{flex:1;border-bottom:.5px solid var(--rule);min-height:1.4em;color:var(--ink)}
.doc-note{font-size:.88rem;color:var(--ink-light);font-style:italic;margin-bottom:.5rem}.doc-narrative{font-size:.97rem;line-height:1.8;color:var(--ink);white-space:pre-wrap;padding:.5rem 0}
.doc-bullet-list{list-style:none;padding:0;margin:.3rem 0}.doc-bullet-list li{position:relative;padding:.15rem 0 .15rem 1rem;border-bottom:.5px dotted var(--rule)}.doc-bullet-list li::before{content:'–';position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--ink-light)}
.doc-sig-block{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1.5rem}.sig-line{margin-bottom:.75rem}.sig-line .label{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--ink-light);letter-spacing:.07em}.sig-line .value{border-bottom:1px solid var(--ink-mid);padding-bottom:.2rem;min-height:1.5em;font-size:.95rem}
.doc-footer{margin-top:2rem;padding-top:1rem;border-top:2px double var(--ink-mid);text-align:center;font-size:.7rem;letter-spacing:.12em;color:var(--ink-light)}
.items-list .item-row{display:flex;gap:.5rem;border-bottom:.5px dotted var(--rule);padding:.25rem 0}.item-num{color:var(--ink-light);min-width:1.5rem}.item-val{flex:1}
.manager{max-width:1050px;margin:2rem auto;padding:0 1rem}.card-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(280px,1fr));gap:1rem}.person-card,.history-card{background:var(--cream);border:1px solid rgba(209,173,72,.55);padding:1rem}
.person-card h3,.history-card h3{font-family:'Oswald',sans-serif;color:var(--navy);letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:.95rem;margin-bottom:.4rem}.muted{color:var(--ink-light);font-style:italic}
.history-actions{display:flex;gap:.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:.7rem}.hidden{display:none!important}
@media print{body{background:white}.hero,.tabs,.selector-section,.form-panel,.preview-toolbar{display:none!important}.main{padding:0}.preview-panel{max-width:100%}#document{box-shadow:none;border:0;padding:1.5rem 2rem}#document::before{display:none}.confidential-stamp{opacity:.35}}
@media(max-width:900px){.main{flex-direction:column;align-items:center}.row-2,.doc-sig-block{grid-template-columns:1fr}.doc-field-row{display:block}.doc-field-label{display:block;min-width:0}.hero-inner{justify-content:center;text-align:center}.hero-mark{display:none}#document{padding:2rem 1.4rem}}

/* Ajuste final de colores DA: granate + azul noche + oro */
body{background:radial-gradient(circle at top,#922020 0,#5f0e0e 180px,#071323 520px,#050b14 100%)!important;}
.hero{background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(95,14,14,.94),rgba(138,23,23,.86),rgba(7,19,35,.92))!important;border-bottom:3px solid var(--gold)!important;}
.tabs,.selector-section{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#071323,#5f0e0e,#071323)!important;}
.form-panel,.panel{border-color:rgba(201,164,71,.72)!important;box-shadow:0 14px 34px rgba(0,0,0,.34)!important;}
.generate-btn{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#5f0e0e,#8a1717)!important;color:#f7df9a!important;border:1px solid rgba(201,164,71,.65)!important;}
#document::before{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#5f0e0e,#c9a447,#071323)!important;}
.doc-title-en{color:#7b1111!important;}

</style>
</head>
<body>
<header class="hero">
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <div class="hero-mark">LSC<br>DA<br>OFFICE</div>
    <div class="hero-text">
      <div class="small">Los Santos County</div>
      <h1>District Attorney's Office</h1>
      <p>Generador de Documentos Legales — Estado de San Andreas</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</header>

<nav class="tabs">
  <button class="tab-btn active" data-view="generator">Generador</button>
  <button class="tab-btn" data-view="characters">Personajes</button>
  <button class="tab-btn" data-view="history">Últimas generaciones</button>
</nav>

<section id="generator" class="view active">
  <div class="selector-section">
    <div class="selector-label">Seleccionar tipo de orden</div>
    <div class="warrant-btns">
      <button class="warrant-btn active" data-type="arrest">A. Orden de Arresto</button>
      <button class="warrant-btn" data-type="search">B. Orden de Registro</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="main">
    <div class="panel form-panel">
      <h2>Rellenar Datos</h2>
      <div class="form-section">
        <div class="form-section-title">Personaje activo</div>
        <div class="row-2">
          <div class="field-group"><label>Usar personaje</label><select id="active-character"></select></div>
          <div class="field-group"><label>Acción rápida</label><button type="button" class="small-btn" id="apply-character">Aplicar al documento</button></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div id="form-arrest">
        <div class="form-section"><div class="form-section-title">I. Solicitud</div><div class="field-group"><label>Nombre del Oficial Solicitante</label><input type="text" id="a-nombre" placeholder="Ej. Det. James Rivera"></div></div>
        <div class="form-section"><div class="form-section-title">II. Información del Caso</div>
          <div class="field-group"><label>Número de Caso</label><input type="text" id="a-caso" placeholder="Ej. LSPD-2024-001234"></div>
          <div class="field-group"><label>Delito(s) Investigado(s)</label><input type="text" id="a-delito" placeholder="Ej. Homicidio en primer grado, PC §187"></div>
          <div class="field-group"><label>Agencia Solicitante</label><input type="text" id="a-agencia" placeholder="Ej. Los Santos Police Department"></div>
          <div class="field-group"><label>Detective / Oficial Responsable</label><input type="text" id="a-detective" placeholder="Ej. Det. James Rivera, Homicidios"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-section"><div class="form-section-title">III. Identificación del Sospechoso</div>
          <div class="field-group"><label>Nombre Completo</label><input type="text" id="a-sospechoso"></div>
          <div class="field-group"><label>Alias</label><input type="text" id="a-alias"></div>
          <div class="row-2"><div class="field-group"><label>Fecha de Nacimiento</label><input type="text" id="a-dob"></div><div class="field-group"><label>Identificación(es)</label><input type="text" id="a-id"></div></div>
          <div class="field-group"><label>Direcciones Asociadas</label><input type="text" id="a-direccion"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-section"><div class="form-section-title">IV. Causa Probable</div><div class="field-group"><label>Narrativa de hechos</label><textarea id="a-narrativa" rows="6"></textarea></div></div>
        <div class="form-section"><div class="form-section-title">V. Observaciones Importantes</div>
          <div class="field-group"><label>Peligrosidad del sospechoso</label><input type="text" id="a-peligro"></div>
          <div class="field-group"><label>Riesgo de fuga</label><input type="text" id="a-fuga"></div>
          <div class="field-group"><label>Posesión o acceso a armas</label><input type="text" id="a-armas"></div>
          <div class="field-group"><label>Historial criminal relevante</label><input type="text" id="a-historial"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-section"><div class="form-section-title">VI. Firma del Afianzante</div>
          <div class="field-group"><label>Nombre del Oficial</label><input type="text" id="a-ofic-nombre"></div>
          <div class="field-group"><label>Agencia</label><input type="text" id="a-ofic-agencia"></div>
          <div class="row-2"><div class="field-group"><label>Fecha</label><input type="text" id="a-fecha"></div><div class="field-group"><label>Hora</label><input type="text" id="a-hora"></div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-section"><div class="form-section-title">VII. Revisión del DA's Office</div>
          <div class="field-group"><label>Fiscal Revisor</label><input type="text" id="a-fiscal"></div>
          <div class="field-group"><label>Fecha de Revisión</label><input type="text" id="a-fiscal-fecha"></div>
          <div class="field-group"><label>Observaciones</label><textarea id="a-observaciones" rows="2"></textarea></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div id="form-search" style="display:none">
        <div class="form-section"><div class="form-section-title">I. Solicitud</div><div class="field-group"><label>Nombre del Oficial Solicitante</label><input type="text" id="s-nombre"></div></div>
        <div class="form-section"><div class="form-section-title">II. Identificación del Caso</div>
          <div class="field-group"><label>Número de Caso</label><input type="text" id="s-caso"></div>
          <div class="field-group"><label>Delito Investigado</label><input type="text" id="s-delito"></div>
          <div class="field-group"><label>Agencia Solicitante</label><input type="text" id="s-agencia"></div>
          <div class="field-group"><label>Detective / Oficial Responsable</label><input type="text" id="s-detective"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-section"><div class="form-section-title">III. Lugar o Propiedad a Registrar</div>
          <div class="field-group"><label>Dirección / Ubicación Exacta</label><input type="text" id="s-direccion"></div>
          <div class="field-group"><label>Descripción del Lugar</label><textarea id="s-desc-lugar" rows="3"></textarea></div>
          <div class="field-group"><label>Persona(s) Involucrada(s)</label><input type="text" id="s-personas"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-section"><div class="form-section-title">IV. Objetos o Evidencia a Buscar</div><div id="items-container"></div><button type="button" class="small-btn" id="add-item">+ Agregar ítem</button></div>
        <div class="form-section"><div class="form-section-title">V. Declaración de Causa Probable</div><div class="field-group"><label>Narrativa de hechos</label><textarea id="s-narrativa" rows="6"></textarea></div></div>
        <div class="form-section"><div class="form-section-title">VII. Firma del Afianzante</div>
          <div class="field-group"><label>Nombre del Oficial</label><input type="text" id="s-ofic-nombre"></div>
          <div class="field-group"><label>Agencia</label><input type="text" id="s-ofic-agencia"></div>
          <div class="row-2"><div class="field-group"><label>Fecha</label><input type="text" id="s-fecha"></div><div class="field-group"><label>Hora</label><input type="text" id="s-hora"></div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-section"><div class="form-section-title">VIII. Revisión del DA's Office</div>
          <div class="field-group"><label>Fiscal Revisor</label><input type="text" id="s-fiscal"></div>
          <div class="field-group"><label>Observaciones</label><textarea id="s-observaciones" rows="2"></textarea></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <button class="generate-btn" id="generate">Generar Documento ↓</button>
    </div>
    <div class="preview-panel">
      <div class="preview-toolbar">
        <button class="tool-btn" onclick="window.print()">Imprimir / Guardar PDF</button>
        <button class="tool-btn" id="copy-btn">Copiar Texto</button>
      </div>
      <div id="document"><div class="confidential-stamp">Confidencial</div><div id="doc-content"><div style="text-align:center;padding:3rem 0;color:var(--ink-light);font-style:italic;">Complete el formulario y presione “Generar Documento”</div></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="characters" class="view">
  <div class="manager">
    <div class="panel">
      <h2>Personajes guardados en caché del navegador</h2>
      <div class="row-2">
        <div class="field-group"><label>Nombre</label><input id="p-name" type="text" placeholder="Ej. James Rivera"></div>
        <div class="field-group"><label>Rango editable</label><input id="p-rank" type="text" placeholder="Ej. Detective II / ADA / Judge / Capitán"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="row-2">
        <div class="field-group"><label>Rol editable</label><input id="p-role" type="text" list="role-options" placeholder="Escribe lo que quieras: Fiscal, Juez, Detective, Perito..."><datalist id="role-options"><option value="Oficial / Detective"><option value="Fiscal / ADA"><option value="Juez"><option value="Supervisor"><option value="Perito"><option value="Agente Federal"></datalist></div>
        <div class="field-group"><label>Agencia</label><input id="p-agency" type="text" placeholder="Ej. Los Santos Police Department"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="row-2">
        <div class="field-group"><label>Unidad / Cargo</label><input id="p-unit" type="text" placeholder="Ej. Homicidios / District Attorney"></div>
        <div class="field-group"><label>Identificación / Placa</label><input id="p-badge" type="text" placeholder="Ej. Badge #4172"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="field-group"><label>Firma / estilo breve</label><input id="p-signature" type="text" placeholder="Ej. ADA Sarah Chen, LSCDAO"></div>
      <button class="generate-btn" id="save-person">Guardar personaje</button>
    </div>
    <br>
    <div class="card-grid" id="people-list"></div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="history" class="view">
  <div class="manager">
    <div class="panel"><h2>Últimas generaciones</h2><p class="muted">Se guardan automáticamente en este navegador. Puedes reabrirlas o borrarlas.</p><br><button class="small-btn danger" id="clear-history">Borrar historial</button></div>
    <br>
    <div class="card-grid" id="history-list"></div>
  </div>
</section>

<script>
const STORAGE_PEOPLE='lscdao_people_v2';
const STORAGE_HISTORY='lscdao_history_v2';
let currentType='arrest';
let editingPersonIndex=null;

const $=s=>document.querySelector(s);
const $$=s=>Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(s));
const safe=v=>String(v??'').replace(/[&<>"']/g,m=>({'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;',"'":'&#039;'}[m]));
const val=id=>($('#'+id)?.value||'').trim();
const setVal=(id,v)=>{const el=$('#'+id); if(el && !el.value) el.value=v||''};
const today=()=>new Date().toLocaleDateString('es-ES');
const nowTime=()=>new Date().toLocaleTimeString('es-ES',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'})+' hrs';
const reviewUTC=()=>new Date().toISOString().replace('T',' ').slice(0,16)+' UTC';

function storeGet(key,fallback=[]){try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(key))||fallback}catch{return fallback}}
function storeSet(key,value){localStorage.setItem(key,JSON.stringify(value))}

function switchView(view){
  $$('.tab-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.toggle('active',b.dataset.view===view));
  $$('.view').forEach(v=>v.classList.toggle('active',v.id===view));
  if(view==='characters') renderPeople();
  if(view==='history') renderHistory();
}
$$('.tab-btn').forEach(btn=>btn.addEventListener('click',()=>switchView(btn.dataset.view)));

function setType(type){
  currentType=type;
  $$('.warrant-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.toggle('active',b.dataset.type===type));
  $('#form-arrest').style.display=type==='arrest'?'block':'none';
  $('#form-search').style.display=type==='search'?'block':'none';
  $('#doc-content').innerHTML='<div style="text-align:center;padding:3rem 0;color:var(--ink-light);font-style:italic;">Complete el formulario y presione “Generar Documento”</div>';
}
$$('.warrant-btn').forEach(btn=>btn.addEventListener('click',()=>setType(btn.dataset.type)));

function addItem(value=''){
  const container=$('#items-container');
  const div=document.createElement('div');
  div.className='item-line';
  div.innerHTML=`<div class="field-group"><label>Ítem</label><input type="text" class="item-input" placeholder="Describir elemento..." value="${safe(value)}"></div><button type="button" class="small-btn danger remove-item">Quitar</button>`;
  div.querySelector('.remove-item').addEventListener('click',()=>div.remove());
  container.appendChild(div);
  renumberItems();
}
function renumberItems(){ $$('#items-container label').forEach((l,i)=>l.textContent=`Ítem ${i+1}`); }
$('#add-item').addEventListener('click',()=>addItem());
['Metanfetamina o precursores químicos','Registros de ventas y comunicaciones','Armas de fuego ilegales'].forEach(addItem);

function getItems(){return $$('.item-input').map(i=>i.value.trim()).filter(Boolean)}

function field(label,value){return `<div class="doc-field-row"><span class="doc-field-label">${safe(label)}</span><span class="doc-field-value">${safe(value)||'&nbsp;'}</span></div>`}

function personDisplay(p){
  if(!p) return '';
  return p.signature || [p.rank,p.name].filter(Boolean).join(' ');
}
function getReviewPerson(){
  const people=storeGet(STORAGE_PEOPLE);
  const selected=people[Number($('#active-character').value)];
  const isReviewer=p=>/fiscal|ada|district attorney|juez|judge|magistrate|revisor/i.test([p?.role,p?.rank,p?.unit].join(' '));
  return isReviewer(selected) ? selected : (people.find(isReviewer) || selected || null);
}
function reviewerBlock(manualName,observaciones){
  const rp=getReviewPerson();
  const name=manualName && manualName!=='_________________' ? manualName : (personDisplay(rp) || '_________________');
  const rank=rp?.rank || '_________________';
  const role=rp?.role || 'Revisor legal';
  const agency=rp?.agency || "Los Santos County District Attorney's Office";
  const badge=rp?.badge || '_________________';
  return `<div class="doc-sig-block"><div><div class="sig-line"><div class="label">Fiscal / Revisor</div><div class="value">${safe(name)}</div></div><div class="sig-line"><div class="label">Rango</div><div class="value">${safe(rank)}</div></div><div class="sig-line"><div class="label">Rol</div><div class="value">${safe(role)}</div></div></div><div><div class="sig-line"><div class="label">Agencia</div><div class="value">${safe(agency)}</div></div><div class="sig-line"><div class="label">Identificación / Placa</div><div class="value">${safe(badge)}</div></div><div class="sig-line"><div class="label">Fecha de revisión</div><div class="value">${safe(reviewUTC())}</div></div><div class="sig-line"><div class="label">Observaciones</div><div class="value">${safe(observaciones)}</div></div></div></div>`;
}

function applyCharacter(){
  const people=storeGet(STORAGE_PEOPLE);
  const person=people[Number($('#active-character').value)];
  if(!person) return;
  const name=person.signature || [person.rank, person.name].filter(Boolean).join(' ');
  if(String(person.role||'').toLowerCase().includes('fiscal') || String(person.role||'').toLowerCase().includes('ada')){
    setVal('a-fiscal',name); setVal('s-fiscal',name);
  }else{
    setVal('a-nombre',name); setVal('a-detective',`${name}${person.unit?' — '+person.unit:''}`); setVal('a-ofic-nombre',name); setVal('a-agencia',person.agency); setVal('a-ofic-agencia',person.agency);
    setVal('s-nombre',name); setVal('s-detective',`${name}${person.unit?' — '+person.unit:''}`); setVal('s-ofic-nombre',name); setVal('s-agencia',person.agency); setVal('s-ofic-agencia',person.agency);
  }
}
$('#apply-character').addEventListener('click',applyCharacter);

function renderPeopleSelect(){
  const people=storeGet(STORAGE_PEOPLE);
  $('#active-character').innerHTML = people.length
    ? people.map((p,i)=>`<option value="${i}">${safe([p.rank,p.name].filter(Boolean).join(' '))} — ${safe(p.role)}</option>`).join('')
    : '<option value="">Sin personajes guardados</option>';
}
function savePerson(){
  const p={name:val('p-name'),rank:val('p-rank'),role:val('p-role'),agency:val('p-agency'),unit:val('p-unit'),badge:val('p-badge'),signature:val('p-signature')};
  if(!p.name){alert('Pon al menos un nombre.');return}
  const people=storeGet(STORAGE_PEOPLE);
  if(editingPersonIndex===null) people.push(p); else people[editingPersonIndex]=p;
  storeSet(STORAGE_PEOPLE,people);
  editingPersonIndex=null;
  ['p-name','p-rank','p-role','p-agency','p-unit','p-badge','p-signature'].forEach(id=>$('#'+id).value='');
  $('#save-person').textContent='Guardar personaje';
  renderPeople(); renderPeopleSelect();
}
$('#save-person').addEventListener('click',savePerson);

function renderPeople(){
  const people=storeGet(STORAGE_PEOPLE);
  $('#people-list').innerHTML = people.length ? people.map((p,i)=>`
    <div class="person-card">
      <h3>${safe(p.name)}</h3>
      <p><strong>Rango:</strong> ${safe(p.rank)||'—'}</p>
      <p><strong>Rol:</strong> ${safe(p.role)||'—'}</p>
      <p><strong>Agencia:</strong> ${safe(p.agency)||'—'}</p>
      <p><strong>Unidad:</strong> ${safe(p.unit)||'—'}</p>
      <p><strong>ID / Placa:</strong> ${safe(p.badge)||'—'}</p>
      <p><strong>Firma:</strong> ${safe(p.signature)||'—'}</p>
      <div class="history-actions">
        <button class="small-btn" onclick="editPerson(${i})">Editar</button>
        <button class="small-btn danger" onclick="deletePerson(${i})">Quitar</button>
      </div>
    </div>`).join('') : '<p class="muted">Aún no hay personajes guardados.</p>';
}
window.editPerson=function(i){
  const p=storeGet(STORAGE_PEOPLE)[i]; if(!p) return;
  editingPersonIndex=i; $('#p-name').value=p.name||''; $('#p-rank').value=p.rank||''; $('#p-role').value=p.role||''; $('#p-agency').value=p.agency||''; $('#p-unit').value=p.unit||''; $('#p-badge').value=p.badge||''; $('#p-signature').value=p.signature||'';
  $('#save-person').textContent='Actualizar personaje'; window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'smooth'});
}
window.deletePerson=function(i){
  const people=storeGet(STORAGE_PEOPLE); people.splice(i,1); storeSet(STORAGE_PEOPLE,people); renderPeople(); renderPeopleSelect();
}

function saveGeneration(type,title,html,text){
  const history=storeGet(STORAGE_HISTORY);
  history.unshift({type,title,html,text,date:new Date().toISOString()});
  storeSet(STORAGE_HISTORY,history.slice(0,20));
}
function renderHistory(){
  const history=storeGet(STORAGE_HISTORY);
  $('#history-list').innerHTML = history.length ? history.map((h,i)=>`
    <div class="history-card">
      <h3>${safe(h.title)}</h3>
      <p><strong>Tipo:</strong> ${safe(h.type==='arrest'?'Orden de arresto':'Orden de registro')}</p>
      <p><strong>Fecha:</strong> ${safe(new Date(h.date).toLocaleString('es-ES'))}</p>
      <div class="history-actions">
        <button class="small-btn" onclick="loadGeneration(${i})">Abrir</button>
        <button class="small-btn" onclick="copyGeneration(${i})">Copiar</button>
        <button class="small-btn danger" onclick="deleteGeneration(${i})">Borrar</button>
      </div>
    </div>`).join('') : '<p class="muted">Todavía no hay documentos generados.</p>';
}
window.loadGeneration=function(i){const h=storeGet(STORAGE_HISTORY)[i]; if(!h)return; $('#doc-content').innerHTML=h.html; switchView('generator');}
window.copyGeneration=function(i){const h=storeGet(STORAGE_HISTORY)[i]; if(!h)return; navigator.clipboard.writeText(h.text);}
window.deleteGeneration=function(i){const h=storeGet(STORAGE_HISTORY);h.splice(i,1);storeSet(STORAGE_HISTORY,h);renderHistory();}
$('#clear-history').addEventListener('click',()=>{if(confirm('¿Borrar todas las últimas generaciones?')){storeSet(STORAGE_HISTORY,[]);renderHistory();}});

function generateDoc(){ currentType==='arrest'?generateArrest():generateSearch(); }
$('#generate').addEventListener('click',generateDoc);

function generateArrest(){
  const nombre=val('a-nombre')||'[NOMBRE DEL OFICIAL]', caso=val('a-caso')||'_________________', delito=val('a-delito')||'_________________', agencia=val('a-agencia')||'_________________', detective=val('a-detective')||'_________________';
  const sospechoso=val('a-sospechoso')||'_________________', alias=val('a-alias')||'N/A', dob=val('a-dob')||'_________________', idDoc=val('a-id')||'_________________', direccion=val('a-direccion')||'_________________';
  const narrativa=val('a-narrativa')||'[Narrativa no proporcionada]', peligro=val('a-peligro')||'_________________', fuga=val('a-fuga')||'_________________', armas=val('a-armas')||'_________________', historial=val('a-historial')||'_________________';
  const oficNombre=val('a-ofic-nombre')||nombre, oficAgencia=val('a-ofic-agencia')||agencia, fecha=val('a-fecha')||today(), hora=val('a-hora')||nowTime(), fiscal=val('a-fiscal')||'_________________', fiscalFecha=reviewUTC(), observaciones=val('a-observaciones')||'Sin observaciones adicionales.';
  const content=`
  <div class="doc-header"><div class="doc-agency">Los Santos County District Attorney's Office</div><div class="doc-state">Estado de San Andreas</div><div class="doc-title-en">Arrest Warrant</div><div class="doc-title-es">Orden de Arresto</div><div class="doc-case-badge">Caso N.° ${safe(caso)}</div></div>
  <div class="doc-section"><div class="doc-section-title">I. Solicitud</div><p>Yo, <strong>${safe(nombre)}</strong>, solicito a la Honorable Corte Superior del Estado de San Andreas la emisión de una orden de arresto basada en causa probable debidamente fundamentada.</p></div>
  <div class="doc-section"><div class="doc-section-title">II. Información del Caso</div>${field('Número de Caso:',caso)}${field('Delito(s) Investigado(s):',delito)}${field('Agencia Solicitante:',agencia)}${field('Detective / Oficial Responsable:',detective)}</div>
  <div class="doc-section"><div class="doc-section-title">III. Identificación del Sospechoso</div>${field('Nombre Completo:',sospechoso)}${field('Alias:',alias)}${field('Fecha de Nacimiento:',dob)}${field('Identificación(es) conocida(s):',idDoc)}${field('Direcciones asociadas:',direccion)}</div>
  <div class="doc-section"><div class="doc-section-title">IV. Causa Probable (Affidavit)</div><p class="doc-note">El oficial abajo firmado declara bajo juramento que existe causa probable. Narrativa clara, objetiva y cronológica:</p><div class="doc-narrative">${safe(narrativa)}</div></div>
  <div class="doc-section"><div class="doc-section-title">V. Observaciones Importantes</div>${field('Peligrosidad del sospechoso:',peligro)}${field('Riesgo de fuga:',fuga)}${field('Posesión o acceso a armas:',armas)}${field('Historial criminal relevante:',historial)}</div>
  <div class="doc-section"><div class="doc-section-title">VI. Firma del Afianzante</div><div class="doc-sig-block"><div><div class="sig-line"><div class="label">Nombre del Oficial</div><div class="value">${safe(oficNombre)}</div></div><div class="sig-line"><div class="label">Agencia</div><div class="value">${safe(oficAgencia)}</div></div></div><div><div class="sig-line"><div class="label">Firma</div><div class="value">&nbsp;</div></div><div class="sig-line"><div class="label">Fecha y Hora</div><div class="value">${safe(fecha)} — ${safe(hora)}</div></div></div></div></div>
  <div class="doc-section"><div class="doc-section-title">VII. Revisión del District Attorney's Office</div>${reviewerBlock(fiscal,observaciones)}</div>
  <div class="doc-footer">Los Santos County District Attorney's Office — Estado de San Andreas — Documento Oficial</div>`;
  $('#doc-content').innerHTML=content; saveGeneration('arrest',`Arrest Warrant — ${caso}`,content,$('#doc-content').innerText);
}
function generateSearch(){
  const nombre=val('s-nombre')||'[NOMBRE DEL OFICIAL]', caso=val('s-caso')||'_________________', delito=val('s-delito')||'_________________', agencia=val('s-agencia')||'_________________', detective=val('s-detective')||'_________________';
  const direccion=val('s-direccion')||'_________________', descLugar=val('s-desc-lugar')||'_________________', personas=val('s-personas')||'N/A', items=getItems(), narrativa=val('s-narrativa')||'[Narrativa no proporcionada]';
  const oficNombre=val('s-ofic-nombre')||nombre, oficAgencia=val('s-ofic-agencia')||agencia, fecha=val('s-fecha')||today(), hora=val('s-hora')||nowTime(), fiscal=val('s-fiscal')||'_________________', observaciones=val('s-observaciones')||'Sin observaciones adicionales.';
  const itemsHtml=items.length?`<div class="items-list">${items.map((it,i)=>`<div class="item-row"><span class="item-num">${i+1}.</span><span class="item-val">${safe(it)}</span></div>`).join('')}</div>`:`<p class="doc-note">No se especificaron ítems.</p>`;
  const content=`
  <div class="doc-header"><div class="doc-agency">Los Santos County District Attorney's Office</div><div class="doc-state">Estado de San Andreas</div><div class="doc-title-en">Search Warrant</div><div class="doc-title-es">Orden de Registro</div><div class="doc-case-badge">Caso N.° ${safe(caso)}</div></div>
  <div class="doc-section"><div class="doc-section-title">I. Solicitud</div><p>Yo, <strong>${safe(nombre)}</strong>, solicito al Tribunal Superior del Estado de San Andreas la aprobación de una orden de registro basada en causa probable debidamente fundamentada.</p></div>
  <div class="doc-section"><div class="doc-section-title">II. Identificación del Caso</div>${field('Número de Caso:',caso)}${field('Delito Investigado:',delito)}${field('Agencia Solicitante:',agencia)}${field('Detective / Oficial Responsable:',detective)}</div>
  <div class="doc-section"><div class="doc-section-title">III. Lugar o Propiedad a Registrar</div>${field('Dirección / Ubicación Exacta:',direccion)}${field('Descripción del Lugar:',descLugar)}${field('Persona(s) Involucrada(s):',personas)}</div>
  <div class="doc-section"><div class="doc-section-title">IV. Objetos o Evidencia a Buscar</div><p class="doc-note">Enumerados de forma clara y específica:</p>${itemsHtml}</div>
  <div class="doc-section"><div class="doc-section-title">V. Declaración de Causa Probable (Affidavit)</div><p class="doc-note">El oficial abajo firmado declara bajo juramento que existe causa probable para creer que la evidencia listada se encuentra en el lugar mencionado:</p><div class="doc-narrative">${safe(narrativa)}</div></div>
  <div class="doc-section"><div class="doc-section-title">VI. Limitaciones y Alcance del Registro</div><ul class="doc-bullet-list"><li>Solo se permite registrar las áreas directamente relacionadas con la búsqueda de los objetos descritos.</li><li>Cualquier evidencia adicional deberá ser documentada conforme a los procedimientos legales.</li><li>El registro deberá ejecutarse en horario diurno salvo autorización expresa del tribunal.</li></ul></div>
  <div class="doc-section"><div class="doc-section-title">VII. Firma del Afianzante</div><div class="doc-sig-block"><div><div class="sig-line"><div class="label">Nombre del Oficial</div><div class="value">${safe(oficNombre)}</div></div><div class="sig-line"><div class="label">Agencia</div><div class="value">${safe(oficAgencia)}</div></div></div><div><div class="sig-line"><div class="label">Firma</div><div class="value">&nbsp;</div></div><div class="sig-line"><div class="label">Fecha y Hora</div><div class="value">${safe(fecha)} — ${safe(hora)}</div></div></div></div></div>
  <div class="doc-section"><div class="doc-section-title">VIII. Revisión del District Attorney's Office</div>${reviewerBlock(fiscal,observaciones)}</div>
  <div class="doc-footer">Los Santos County District Attorney's Office — Estado de San Andreas — Documento Oficial</div>`;
  $('#doc-content').innerHTML=content; saveGeneration('search',`Search Warrant — ${caso}`,content,$('#doc-content').innerText);
}
$('#copy-btn').addEventListener('click',e=>{navigator.clipboard.writeText($('#doc-content').innerText).then(()=>{const old=e.target.textContent;e.target.textContent='Copiado ✓';setTimeout(()=>e.target.textContent=old,1600);});});

renderPeopleSelect(); renderPeople(); renderHistory();
</script>
</body>
</html>
